message.content: {"analysis":"Autotune completed with best score 0.6022. Retraining on full data (13.5%). After this, evaluation and quantization will follow. The 0.6022 score is below 0.62, likely due to the model size constraint. I'll need to try a new approach after this completes.","plan":"Wait for retraining, evaluation, and quantization to finish. Then run a new approach without model size constraint.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"","duration":60.0}]}
